personalInfo.title: Software Developer
personalInfo.summary: Computer Science Engineering graduate (2026) with hands-on experience developing scalable full-stack web applications using the MERN stack and AI technologies. Built multiple production-style projects including AI-powered news analysis, resume builder, carbon footprint tracker, and e-commerce platform. Strong foundation in Data Structures, REST APIs, MongoDB, authentication, and modern React development. Passionate about building performant software and solving real-world engineering problems.

education.school: Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow

projects.name: ATS Resume Builder
projects.description:
• Developed a full-stack ATS-friendly Resume Builder with multiple professional templates and real-time resume preview.
• Implemented Google OAuth and JWT authentication with secure MongoDB data storage for personalized resume management.
• Built drag-and-drop section reordering, resume customization, and PDF export functionality with responsive design.
• Designed RESTful APIs for resume creation, editing, template management, and user profile handling.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, Google OAuth, PDF Generation

projects.name: NextCart – E-Commerce Platform
projects.description:
• Developed a scalable MERN-based e-commerce platform featuring secure authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, and order management.
• Implemented product search, category filtering, responsive UI, and RESTful APIs for inventory and user management.
• Integrated MongoDB for product and customer data with secure JWT-based authentication.
• Built reusable React components to improve maintainability and deliver a smooth shopping experience.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT Authentication, REST APIs

projects.name: AI Career Mentor
projects.description:
• Developed an AI-powered career guidance platform that generates personalized learning roadmaps and interview preparation plans.
• Integrated Google's Gemini API to provide context-aware career recommendations and skill-gap analysis.
• Designed REST APIs with secure authentication and responsive React frontend.
• Improved user experience through AI-generated mentorship and personalized career insights.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Gemini API, REST APIs

projects.name: NewsGuard AI – Fake News Detection Platform
projects.description:
• Built an AI-powered fake news detection platform supporting text, URL, and PDF-based news analysis.
• Integrated machine learning models using TF-IDF and Logistic Regression for credibility prediction.
• Designed REST APIs and MongoDB backend with responsive React frontend.
• Deployed the application on Render with cloud-based backend services and CORS configuration.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Machine Learning, TF-IDF, Logistic Regression

projects.name: CarbonWise AI
projects.description:
• Developed an AI-powered sustainability platform that estimates users' carbon footprint from daily activities.
• Integrated Gemini AI to generate personalized recommendations for reducing environmental impact.
• Built an interactive dashboard to visualize emissions and sustainability progress.
• Implemented responsive UI and Firebase integration for scalable data management.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Firebase, Gemini API, JavaScript

projects.name: Cloud File Storage System
projects.description:
• Developed a secure cloud-based file storage application with user authentication and file management features.
• Built REST APIs for uploading, downloading, and organizing files with MongoDB metadata storage.
• Implemented responsive React frontend for efficient file management.
projects.technologies: MERN Stack, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB
